messages.content: Hi! I'm OpenShield AI. I can help you understand security findings, explain remediations, and answer questions about your Azure security posture. You currently have 136 open findings across 247 resources — 12 HIGH, 35 MEDIUM, and 89 LOW severity. Your overall security score is 72/100. What would you like to know?

suggestions: What are my most critical findings right now?
How do I fix the SSH vulnerability on nsg-web?
Which resources have the most issues?
Explain the compliance impact of my open findings
What changed in my environment in the last 48 hours?

executiveSummary.overview: Your Azure environment of 247 resources has 136 open findings across 7 categories. The most critical exposures are internet-accessible management ports (SSH/RDP) and an open SQL database firewall — all three are actively exploitable with no authentication required. Your security posture has improved 17 points since December but remains below the 80-point target.

topPriorities.title: Disable public blob access on storage accounts
